passives.desc:
Gains a new pattern when this unit's HP drops to 66% or less for the first time

Upon pattern change,
- Raise Min & Max Speed values by 1
- Convert [BloomingThorns] on self to [BloomingThorns_2nd]
- All allies gain 3 [FestivalFever] and 3 [BloomingThorns] at every turn
passives.name: Parade of Happiness

passives.desc:
Gains a new pattern when this unit's HP drops to 33% or less for the first time

Upon pattern change,
- Raise Min & Max Speed values by 2
- Uses a powerful Skill; then weakens Resistances against Slash, Pierce, and Blunt (+0.5)
- Convert [BloomingThorns] and [BloomingThorns_2nd] on self to [BloomingThorns_3rd]
- All allies gain 5 [FestivalFever] and 5 [BloomingThorns] at every turn
passives.name: Eternal Parade of Happiness

passives.desc: Turn End: if at 5+ [IncompleteParade], use a powerful Skill next turn
passives.name: The Parade Repeats for Eternity

passives.desc:
Turn Start: gain 8 [Protection]
- With every ally death, gain 1 less [Protection] at Turn Start
Turn End: If this unit did not take any HP damage this turn, gain 2 [Agility] next turn
passives.name: The Parade's Lady

passives.desc:
Turn End: If there are no surviving allies nor Backup allies, consume all [FestivalFever] and [IncompleteParade] next turn and become Staggered (activates immediately if there are no surviving allies at Turn Start)

In the turn after this unit is Staggered, summon 2 Kindred Bloodfiends
passives.name: This isn't how it ends

passives.desc:
If this unit is on field, or is one of the units that can appear on this Stage, increase [BloodDinner] value by the amount of [Laceration] damage collectively received by every unit. 
When this unit enters the field, the sleeping blood drenching the battlefield will fill the surface.
passives.name: Bloodfeast

passives.desc: Gain [StarvingDolcineaOne] at the start of the Encounter
passives.name: Starved and Withered

passives.desc:
Gain 1 [FestivalFever] every time this unit applies a positive buff to other allies with its Skill effects (once per type of buff)

Turn Start: gain [FestivalFever] equal to the number of other allies (max 3)
Turn End: heal SP equal to [FestivalFever] on self (does not activate at -45 SP)

Turn End: at 10+ [FestivalFever], use a powerful Skill next turn (however, if 'The Parade Repeats for Eternity' is active, this effect does not activate)
passives.name: Festival of Wonders

passives.desc: Turn End: if in Panic, reset SP to 0.
passives.name: Panic Recovery

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.

- If the target is an ally, replace this effect with 3 [AttackUp] until next turn

descs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +3 [Laceration] Count

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [DefenseUp] for every 6 [Laceration] on the target (max 3 of each)

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Final Power +1 for every 5 [FestivalFever] on self or every 6 [Laceration] on the target (max 4)
[WhenUse] At less than 15 [BloodDinner], gain 15 [Laceration] and immediately trigger it once, then reduce [Laceration] Count by 1 (at less than 10% HP, activate only the part of this effect where this unit gains [Laceration] Potency and Count)
[EndSkill] Consume 15 [BloodDinner]
skills.name: Beckon the Audience Hither...

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [AttackUp] and [DefenseUp] until next turn based on [FestivalFever] (1 per 3 [FestivalFever], max 3 of each)

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +3 [Laceration] Count
- If the target is an ally, replace this effect with 5 [BloomingThorns]

skills.desc:
[CantIdentify]
Prioritizes enemies for its main target, and prioritizes allies for its sub-targets. If the target is an ally, Clash Power +10 and always fix the damage to 0.
[WhenUse] Clash Power +1 for every 20 [BloodDinner_Accumulation] by this unit (max 10)
[WhenUse] At less than 25 [BloodDinner], gain 25 [Laceration], immediately trigger it once, then lose 1 [Laceration] Count (at less than 10% HP, activate only the part of this effect where this unit gains [Laceration] Potency and Count)
[EndSkill] Consume 25 [BloodDinner]
[EndBattle] Consume all [FestivalFever]
skills.name: Parade of Wonders

descs: [EndCoin] Gain 1 [BloomingThorns] for every 10 [BloodDinner] consumed by this Skill (max 10)

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Clash Power +1 for every 20 [BloodDinner_Accumulation] by this unit (max 10)
[WhenUse] At less than 50 [BloodDinner], gain 25 [Laceration], +2 [Laceration] Count, immediately trigger it twice, then reduce [Laceration] Count by 2 (at less than 10% HP, activate only the part of this effect where this unit gains [Laceration] Potency and Count)
[WhenUse] Consume half of [BloodDinner]
[EndBattle] Consume all [IncompleteParade]
[EndBattle] Gain 10 [FestivalFever]
skills.name: The Parade Repeats for Eternity

[WhenUse] At 5+ [FestivalFever], Clash Power +3
[StartBattle] Gain 5 [BloomingThorns]
[DefeatDuel] Lose 5 [BloomingThorns]
skills.name: And that's all it does...

descs: [EndCoin] Gain 1 [BloomingThorns] for every 10 [BloodDinner] consumed by this Skill (max 10)

passives.desc:
Turn End: If Panicked, recover from Panic at the next Turn Start and reset SP to 0.
When recovering from Panic:
- Consume 30 [BloodDinner] to gain 2 [Enhancement] and 1 [BloodScissor] next turn, and heal 20 SP.
- If this unit failed to consume [BloodDinner], gain 30 [Laceration], immediately take the damage from [Laceration], then lose 3 [Laceration] Count. Then, gain 2 [Enhancement], 2 [AttackDmgUp], and heal 20 SP next turn.

Gains a new pattern at 40% of this unit's max HP

If this unit is on field, or is one of the units that can appear on this Stage, increase [BloodDinner] value by the amount of [Laceration] damage collectively received by every unit.

- [BloodScissor] cannot drop below 1
- At 10+ [BloodScissor], convert them to [BloodScissorTwo].
- At 20+ [BloodScissor], convert them to [BloodScissorThree].
If this unit consumes [BloodScissor] and drops below the above thresholds, convert them accordingly.
passives.name: Bloodsteeped Scissors

passives.desc:
On Clash Win, if the target has [Laceration], heal this unit's Part & Core by 40% of the HP damage dealt.
Attack End: If this unit healed at least 100 HP, heal 10 SP
